metadata.description: Multi-chat orchestration for Claude Code. Single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: claude-bridge
plugins.description: MCP server for cross-Claude-Code-chat orchestration. Peer messaging, chat read/search, live context + rate-limits monitoring via chained statusLine wrapper + PostToolUse OAuth hook, peer_set_context_guard + peer_set_rate_limit_guard, idle-beep notification, bundled role skills (manager, memory-keeper, setup). v0.9.3: fixes Windows stdio probe-close crash-loop that made claude-bridge unusable on Windows.
